title: Woman Buried Alive
overview: Duke Philippe marries Cristina, the daughter of a fisherman.  But his brothers, seeing that they would be cut from the family inheritance set to go to Cristina, decide to get rid of her by imprisoning her in a tower and making the duke believe she died.
